description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.
It's a mortar. Do not use indoor.
Deals no Damage. Hit targets with Meat eyes roll DV13 Resist Torture/Drugs Check. On fail suffer Damaged Eye Critical Injury (See pg. 188) for 1 minute. Does not deal critical bonus damage.
Deals no Damage. Fills a 10m/yd x 10m/yd with smoke for 1 minute. Tasks obscured by smoke have a -4 penalty.
If damage dealt to target they are set alight. Target takes 2 damage to HP at end of their turn unless they use action to extinguish flames. Does not stack.
No immediate damage. If meat target hit, DV13 Resist Torture/Drugs Check. On a fail 2d6 damage to HP. No Ablation.
No immediate damage. If hit DV15 Resist Torture/Drugs Check. On a fail 3d6 damage to HP. No Ablation.
Deals no damage. If hit roll DV15 Resist Torture/Drugs. On a fail take the Damaged Eye and Damaged Ear Critical injuries (see pg. 188) for 1 minute. No Crit damage dealt.
If hit DV15 Cybertech Check. On Fail 2 pieces of Cyberware or carried electronics (GM's choice) stop working for 1 minute. Cyberlimbs hang loosely like a dismembered meat arm see pg. 187.

Deals no damage. If meat target hit DV13 Resist Torture/Drugs. On fail falls Prone (see pg. 169) and unconscious for 1 minute. Can be woken by damage or another person using an action to touch/shake them.
A literal explosion of shurikens. Can apply second Critical Injury, details of which can be found on page 87.

information.notes:
A 6th Street mortar emplacement is a long tube with a stand on the end of it, capable of firing any type of greande. Setting it up requires an action; once set up, it cannot be moved until it is either destroyed or taken down, which requires 1 minute.

Once the gun is set up, it must be manned; the individual manning it fires its weapon on their turn, but may use the martial skill associated with the turret in place of their own, if they wish.

The mortar fires up, and then down; it can't be used indoors, and can't hit targets closer than 40 meters away.

Token and art by Mattew Reger - find him on Instagram at kingof.roses (link).
